headline: Wingstop (WING) Soars 5.3%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Wingstop (WING) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
